description_long: This object consists of two metallic bowls, each with a wide, shallow basin and a short, flared pedestal base. The surfaces are predominantly dark gray with a slightly reflective, metallic sheen, and one bowl shows subtle discoloration and patina, suggesting some age or exposure to elements. The rims are smooth and rounded, and the interiors appear clean and unadorned. The bowls are robust and utilitarian, with no visible handles or additional features. Their simple, functional design is typical of metal kitchenware used for serving or holding food. The overall appearance suggests durability and suitability for repeated use in both indoor and outdoor urban environments.
description: A pair of metallic, pedestal-based bowls with a dark, slightly reflective finish and subtle signs of wear. Their simple, utilitarian design suggests durability and practical use.
description_view_0: Two metallic bowls side by side, showing their wide, open basins and flared bases; the left bowl appears slightly darker and more uniform, while the right bowl shows some patina.
description_view_1: Front-facing view of the bowls, emphasizing the depth of the basins and the symmetry of their pedestal bases.
description_view_2: Side view of the bowls, highlighting the curvature of the basins and the subtle differences in surface finish between the two.
description_view_3: Rear view of the bowls, showing the rounded backs and the consistent metallic texture across both objects.
attribute_location: kitchen, dining table, or outdoor food stall
attribute_context_of_use: serving or holding food items, such as soups, salads, or snacks
